title: 016 CABAGGE TALES
description:
Roots of Communication: cut it - watch it - eat it - DIGEST it. The mind is restructured by digestion. Seminar on Communication given to the Freshman's class on the campus of the Catholic University in Piliscaba, Hungary. With guest Márta Sebestyén, (English Patient, Kossuth prize winner 1999). 

Documentary 
camera 1: Jurij Burak 
camera 2: László Dörflinger 
camera 3: Ernö Nagy 
camera 4: Péter Szalai 
editing: Sándor Gréczi 
coordination: András Péterffy 
guest: Márta Sebestyén "the cabbage is round" 
directed and produced by Jürg Da Vaz 
filmed on site at Catholic University in Piliscaba, Hungary.
a handmade Da Vaz production© 1999
